title: It rains solid diamonds on 2 real planets #Shorts
desc: Scientists say that deep inside the ice giants Neptune and Uranus, crushing pressure rips methane apart and squeezes the freed carbon into pure diamond, which forms about 7,000 kilometers down and then sinks toward the core like a rain of gems. In 2017, researchers recreated those conditions by blasting plastic with lasers and nearly every carbon atom turned to diamond in a single nanosecond. The universe grows diamonds by the ton.
